heroTitle: Turn analysis output into executable optimization work
heroDescription: Optimize focuses on priorities, recoverable savings, and next actions. It should not repeat diagnostic evidence. Start with rule-based actions, then use the AI report for strategy-level guidance.
principle2: Fix the workflow pattern before fixing one-off sessions.
principle3: Use the AI report as a strategy layer, not as a replacement for rule hits.

summary.queueHint: Optimization work items generated from rule hits
summary.recoverableHint: Estimated savings available from the current action queue
summary.topPriorityHint: The action that should be handled first
summary.batchWasteHint: Total waste estimated in the latest analysis batch

actionQueueDescription: Every item is derived from triggered rules and includes direct execution steps.
emptyTitle: There are no optimization actions queued
emptyDescription: Run analysis first so the system can build actions from real rule hits.

status.error_NO_PROVIDER: No AI provider available. Configure an API key or start Ollama in Settings.
status.error_CONNECTION_ERROR: Failed to connect to AI service. Check your network or service status.

aiReportDescription: Use this as a strategy layer on top of the rule-based action queue.
clickAnalyzePrompt: Click "Generate AI Report" for additional strategy suggestions
aiWillAnalyze: The AI will add cross-rule strategy suggestions based on the current issue patterns
noOptimizationIssues: The AI did not add new optimization issues
